title: GitHub Projects v2 board spec
description: Declarative schema for a Projects v2 board, applied by scripts/bootstrap-projects.sh. One file per board under scripts/projects/. The current spec format mixes desired state with continuity hints (option IDs) — see issue #90 for the cleaner split planned in a future tool.

owner.description: GitHub login that owns the project (user or organisation).

title.description: Project title. Lookup is by title, not number, so renaming the board in the UI requires updating this spec.

fields.description: Custom fields the script manages. Built-in fields (Title, Assignees, …) and any field not listed here are left alone.

id.description: GitHub-assigned option ID. Not declarative — it's a continuity hint so a UI rename can be reverted to the canonical name without orphaning items (matching is ID-first, name second). Capture the ID after creation; omit for new options. Tracked separately in the cleaner tool planned in #90.
